name: Original"philly" Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the graham cracker crumbs and melted margarine; press evenly onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 325 degrees F. for 10 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, combine cream cheese, sugar, lemon juice, grated lemon peel, and vanilla extract. Mix until well blended.
4. Add egg yolks one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
5. Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
6. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the cream cheese mixture.
7. Pour the batter over the crust in the springform pan.
8. Bake at 300 degrees F. for 45 minutes.
9. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan; allow it to cool before removing the rim of the pan.
10. Chill completely. Top with cherry pie filling or fresh fruit, if desired.
